description: Debt-lock line-count ceilings for high-risk split-plan files. Reductions are allowed; increases require an explicit architecture review and baseline update.

Makefile.reason: Root Makefile must remain a thin entrypoint and delegate implementation to included fragments.

frontend/apps/web/src/layouts/AppShell.v.reason: Application shell is a split-plan layout file and must not absorb page-specific behavior.

frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractForm.reason: Contract form route shell completed the P4-P0 split baseline and must not grow above the mainline extraction result.

frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ListPage.vue.reason: List route shell is a split-plan file and should delegate contract runtime and rendering concerns.

frontend/apps/web/src/stores/session.ts.reason: Session store is a split-plan runtime file and must not accumulate unrelated product state.

frontend/apps/web/src/views/ActionView.v.reason: Action view shell is a split-plan file and should remain a contract orchestration surface.

frontend/apps/web/src/views/BusinessConf.reason: Business configuration surface is a P0 split-plan file and must not grow during convergence.

frontend/apps/web/src/views/HomeView.vue.reason: Home/workbench shell is a split-plan file and should delegate panels and data adapters.

frontend/apps/web/src/views/MenuConfigVi.reason: Menu configuration surface is a split-plan file and should delegate policy, ordering, and presentation helpers.

frontend/apps/web/src/views/MyWorkView.v.reason: My Work surface is a split-plan file and should delegate task/query composition.

frontend/apps/web/src/views/SceneView.vu.reason: Scene view is a split-plan file and should delegate scene runtime and rendering helpers.
